creator: drhowarddrfine@charter.net
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

I just tried again and the drop downs worked but when I opened a second tab, they didn't. I'm running i3 window manager with two monitors and put firefox on the second monitor where it worked. Then it didn't. 

Thinking it might be i3 related, or some other updated port, I rebooted my workstation and everything seems fine for the moment.

I'll leave this open till the morning when I do a rush of work and, if the problem goes away, I'll close this.
